facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this one. Dgold Spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where locals quietly recover after a day in the heat. Body massage, foot massage, shampoo, nails. All under one roof. 4.9 stars from 58 reviews and zero hype. That ratio means something. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
